title: ipomoea obvallatus
intro: Ipomoea obvallatus, commonly known as the wallflower morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea obvallatus include treating fever, headaches, and digestive issues, as well as supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
